encouragement.streak_low: Every journey begins with a single step. Keep going!
encouragement.streak_medium: You're building a great habit! Consistency is key to success.
encouragement.streak_high: Amazing dedication! Your persistence is truly paying off.
encouragement.streak_legendary: Unstoppable! You're an inspiration to language learners everywhere!

levelDescription.4: Basic User — Can handle familiar situations with limited vocabulary
levelDescription.4.5: Basic User — Improving gradually, building foundational skills
levelDescription.5: Modest User — Competent in everyday situations with some limitations
levelDescription.5.5: Modest User — Growing confidence in routine communications
levelDescription.6: Competent User — Effective in familiar contexts, handles basic work scenarios
levelDescription.6.5: Competent User — Good for daily and professional communication
levelDescription.7: Good User — Handles complex language well with occasional inaccuracies
levelDescription.7.5: Good User — Strong command, minor errors in unfamiliar contexts
levelDescription.8: Very Good User — Near-native fluency, rare inaccuracies
levelDescription.8.5: Very Good User — Exceptional command in all contexts
levelDescription.9: Expert User — Full operational command, native-like proficiency
